title: Better Horses
description: Remodeled horses with tons of new base colors and patterns!
body:
Better Horses!

Remodeled Horses with tons of new base colors and patterns!

New Base Colors:

  • Black: Sliver mane, Blue roan, Brown roan, Ash brown, Jet black
  • Brown: Dun, Brindle, Light seal bay, Mahogany, Dappled brown
  • Chestnut: Standard, Red dun, Strawberry roan, Red taffy
  • Creamy: Standard bay, Buckskin, Strawberry, Bay roan, Dappled beige
  • Darkbrown: Blue taffy, Dark buckskin, Seal bay, Chocolate flax
  • Gray: Sliver, Classic champagne, Grullo, Dappled gray
  • White: Cremello, Palomino, Pearl, Amber champagne, Ivory champagne
  • Donkeys: Classic, Red, Black, Darkbrown, White, and Gray

New Patterns:

  • White: Socks and Sabino
  • Whitefield: Overo, Splashed and Tobiano
  • Whitedots: Snowflake, Blanket, and Near-leopard Appaloosa
  • Blackdots: Mosaic and Sooty

Remodeled with new animations:

  • Added details: More realistic legs, snouts, and longer manes, Donkeys have shorter snouts and long ears, Mules have medium snouts and ears
  • Improved Animations: Grazing, and Rearing are more fluid

Tutorial

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
In order to prevent texture issues, Better Horses should be at the TOP of your Resource Pack list.
